_comment: Objective expectations for the 10-ticket triage regression suite (run_prompt_tests.py). Each entry asserts the expected intent and priority for the matching ticket-NNN.json. Sentiment is intentionally NOT asserted: it is the softest of the three fields and the suite keeps its pass/fail criteria objective (valid JSON + correct intent + correct priority). The 10 tickets cover all 5 intents and the edge cases called for in the brief: empty (008), bilingual+furious (009), and shouting/all-caps (010).
